description: Verify that a work item has the approved artifacts and honest test evidence required for delivery.

failures.message: The work item has no approved observable acceptance criteria.
failures.remediation: Create or approve the PRD acceptance criteria before delivery.

failures.message: The work item has no executed test evidence or recorded reason it could not be run.
failures.remediation: Run the relevant checks and record results, or document the blocker and residual risk.
